name: Bewi Cat Adult - Poultry 1KG
shortDescription: Bewi Cat Adult Poultry Dry Food is a balanced and nutritious complete cat food specially developed for adult cats. Made with high-quality poultry protein and carefully selected ingredients, this premium dry cat food supports healthy muscles, digestion, immunity, and overall wellbeing while providing a delicious taste cats love.
description: Suitable for both indoor and outdoor cats, BEWI CAT® Adult Poultry delivers complete daily nutrition to help maintain your cat’s health, vitality, and healthy body condition. Why Choose BEWI CAT® Adult Poultry? High-Quality Poultry Protein for Strong Muscles This poultry-rich formula provides quality animal protein that helps maintain lean muscle mass, strength, and healthy body condition in adult cats. Supports Healthy Digestion Made with easily digestible ingredients, BEWI CAT Adult Poultry helps support digestive comfort and efficient nutrient absorption for optimal health. Healthy Skin & Shiny Coat Essential fatty acids help nourish the skin and promote a soft, shiny coat while supporting overall skin health. Balanced Vitamins & Minerals Enriched with important vitamins and minerals, this complete formula helps support: Strong immunity Daily energy levels Healthy metabolism Overall vitality Complete & Balanced Daily Diet Specially formulated to meet the nutritional needs of adult cats, this balanced recipe provides reliable everyday nutrition for long-term health and wellbeing. Key Benefits of BEWI CAT® Adult Poultry Complete dry food for adult cats Made with quality poultry protein Supports healthy muscles and body condition Gentle on digestion and easy to digest Supports healthy skin and shiny coat Balanced vitamins and minerals for immunity and vitality Suitable for indoor and outdoor cats Delicious poultry flavour cats enjoy Complete and balanced daily nutrition Ideal For BEWI CAT Adult Poultry Dry Food is suitable for: Adult cats of all breeds Indoor and outdoor cats Cats needing balanced daily nutrition Cats requiring digestive support Cats needing skin and coat care Feeding Guide Feed according to your cat’s age, weight, and activity level Introduce gradually over 5–7 days when changing food Divide daily portions into two meals Always provide fresh, clean drinking water Storage Instructions Store in a cool, dry place Reseal packaging after opening to maintain freshness For animal use only Premium Everyday Nutrition for Adult Cats BEWI CAT Adult Poultry Dry Food provides complete daily nutrition designed to support healthy digestion, strong muscles, shiny coats, and long-term vitality. Keep your cat healthy, active, and satisfied with BEWI CAT® Adult Poultry premium poultry-based nutrition for adult cats.
